0.text: Paraseptal emphysema in both lung apices

1.text: Pleuroparenchymal fibrosis in both lung apices

2.text: Traction bronchiectatic changes in the posterior segment of the left upper lobe

3.text: Peribronchial thickening in the left lung inferior lingular segment

4.text: Parenchymal distortion in the left lung inferior lingular segment

5.text: Traction bronchiectasis in the left lung inferior lingular segment

6.text: Fibrotic bands in the right middle lobe medial segment

7.text: Fibrotic bands in the left lung lingular segment

8.text: Multiple calcified nodules in the left lung, largest measuring 7 mm in diameter, located subpleurally in the anteromedial basal segment of the lower lobe
